institution.name: The University of Texas at Arlington

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas at Arlington rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.6k → $8.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Texas at Arlington rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (28.1% → 33.6%).
